description: A bold commercial poster advertising Pernod Fils liqueur. A large green bottle of Pernod dominates the center, partially overlapping a smiling man's face on the left side. A small glass of the pale green liqueur sits in front of the bottle. The text 'PERNOD FILS' appears in large yellow letters across the top. The background is bright yellow against a blue border. The design is geometric and striking with flat color areas.
